items.name_en: (Qixi Limited Edition) Bottega Veneta
items.name_cn:
(Qixi Limited Edition) Bottega Veneta
This Cassette woven cube bag is simple, chic, understated, and luxurious.
The latest version features a triangular logo pattern on the side! A very practical bag for commuting. The minimalist design combines BV's classic weaving art, making it very easy to match with everyday outfits. Every color is sophisticated, and the soft lambskin looks high-quality. Stylish and chic when worn.
Crossbody, shoulder, or clutch. Unisex.
Size: 23*15*5.5
Style No.: 80820#

specs.rawTitle:

Style No.: 80820#

items.name_en: #BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
items.name_cn:
#BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
Very casual style 🔥
High-end feel, quiet and simple from the BV runway collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different aesthetics
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, the unique high-end feel is presented through the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740898
Size: 26*3*30cm

items.name_en: 🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.
items.name_cn:
🧡BV True Love Black and White Panda 15-grid, this is my favorite BV bag this year. Canvas with sheepskin, black and white color scheme is simply beautiful to my heart. Continuing BV's signature weaving elements, minimalist style, no flashy decorations, very versatile and stylish~ Perfect for daily use to carry phone, lipstick, car keys, etc.
Style: 741451
Size: 23*15*5.5cm

items.name_en: 1BV Early Spring New Clicker Curved Bag ✅
items.name_cn:
1BV Early Spring New Clicker Curved Bag ✅
Flat yet textured
With curved metal design
Fashionable and elegant 😍 Every compartment will imprint your story
The logo and mark are a form of expression
And I choose to be silent like a riddle
Bottega Veneta classic Intreccio woven leather Clicker handbag
Under simplicity, luxury and elegance are fully revealed
Style No.: 730968
Dimensions: 28*10*24

items.name_en: 30cm
items.name_cn:
30cm
Bottega Veneta ✨Extra Large Rectangular Tote
Traditional woven elements, Intrecciato woven imported cowhide tote handbag. Comes with a small card holder inside and a connecting buckle. The entire bag is handwoven from lambskin. 🌈Only the highest quality in the market, welcome to compare.
Size: 30*20*11.5cm
Model: 652867. Comes with a full set of packaging
